title: Network DNS Regression Investigation
headline: One-shot investigation with strong retrieval support and before/after comparison.
description: Investigates a DNS regression using the current and previous network logs to show strong retrieval support and a concise manager summary without entering workflow mode.

request_body.prompt: Investigate this network incident using the failing run and the previous healthy run.

notes: Use this path when you want a fast grounded answer without durable workflow state.
It is a reliable retrieval example because the runbook and the previous healthy log align with the failing symptoms.

operator_steps: Review the supporting citations and the grounded manager summary.
Use the result to explain the difference between /investigate and the checkpointed workflow.
